message:
fix(core): replace unwrap() with graceful error handling in 3 modules

- dataflow: add_edge uses if-let instead of unwrap after contains_key
- dataflow: flush_debounce uses let-else continue on missing node
- ingest: is_new uses single get_mut instead of get+get_mut+unwrap
- storage: shutdown uses map_err on mutex lock instead of unwrap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
